description: So basically this guy was my mate but then he started to buy cheats and call me bad. He bought cheats in early july and then most recently last weekend. he did not play ranked at all up until he bought cheats. Next season he has confirmed to me he is going to buy cheats again for 1 week this time. He had zero recoil on twitch f2 and prefired headshots many times. The 2 times he bought cheats his kd sckyrockted to 3kd and he bought it on saturday the 10th. He has one like 40 games in a row with cheats. I have proof he is an active member of klar.gg and i can show you his kd trends. I really want to get him banned as he keeps shit talking even though he is cheating. he got a few people banned, they were cheating but he makes fun of them for getting banned. He also elo boosted 'Vroum' Multiple times with cheats. Vroum is also cheating, Natklo screenshares the esp cheats and then vruom knows where they are at all times. I know their plan as i am undercover with them. I also think Vruom should get a ban for his constant elo boosted and actually cheating using screnhacks off a legit cheater. This guy has such a big attitude and I have proof of his cheats. I dont have the direct screenshot but i can show you the formatiing of when he was on the cheats. This is the way it is formatted. The spike from silver 3 to gold 4 was in one singular day which was when he was cheating. Mind you he also got carried by a cheater and then the cheater got banned so he got an rp rollback to the point he only gains 4 rp on a win. Now he gains 30 like usual because he won like 30 matches in a row with cheats. Both of these guys arent playing the game legit and are ruining ranked. This is not good. I will also provide video evidence in a custom match when he was talking shit so he full toggled the cheats. He wallbanged prefired my drone and full cheated. I know you said to not use evidence from your website but the 2 times he got cheats he peaked at plat 5 then gold 4 after being hard stuck silver. These 2 days he bought klar.gg lite. I can maybe get evidence of his acutal proof he bought it. Update he is so dumb he sent me a screenshot of his order hisotry turns out he bought it more than just the august 10th. I am not at my pc as of right now I will update this with video evidence.
